# Movement

<!-- source: PDF p.47 -->

## General rules governing movement

<!-- p.47 -->

## Initiation of combat.

<!-- p.49 -->

## Orders

<!-- p.50 -->

### Move

<!-- p.50 -->

### Sneak

<!-- p.50 -->

### Patrol

<!-- p.50 -->

### Defend

<!-- p.51 -->

### Move and Patrol

<!-- p.51 -->

### Blood Hunt

<!-- p.51 -->

### Break Siege

<!-- p.52 -->

### Maintain Siege

<!-- p.52 -->

### Storm Castle

<!-- p.52 -->

### Assassinate

<!-- p.52 -->

#### Scale Walls

<!-- p.52 -->

#### Mounts

<!-- p.52 -->

### Seduction

<!-- p.53 -->

#### Dream Seduction

<!-- p.53 -->

#### Corruption

<!-- p.53 -->

#### Lure of the sirens

<!-- p.53 -->

### Preach

<!-- p.53 -->

### Pillage

<!-- p.53 -->

### Raid

<!-- p.53 -->

### Reanimate

<!-- p.53 -->

#### Manikin Reanimation

<!-- p.54 -->

### Contact Allies

<!-- p.54 -->

### Perform Blood Sacrifice

<!-- p.54 -->

### Capture Slaves

<!-- p.54 -->

### Become Prophet

<!-- p.54 -->

### Instill Uprising

<!-- p.54 -->

### Infiltrate

<!-- p.54 -->

### Hide

<!-- p.54 -->

### Attack Current Province

<!-- p.55 -->

### Construct Building

<!-- p.55 -->

### Demolish Building

<!-- p.55 -->

## Turn resolution sequence

<!-- p.55 -->


::: callout-note
Transcription pending.
:::
